mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iam_user (id, tenant_id, username, password_hash, display_name, phone, primary_department_id, status, must_change_password, session_version, last_login_at, version, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{user.id}, #{user.tenantId}, #{user.username}, #{user.passwordHash}, #{user.username}, NULL, #{user.primaryDepartmentId}, #{user.status.name}, #{user.mustChangePassword}, #{user.sessionVersion}, NULL, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE iam_user SET password_hash = #{user.passwordHash}, primary_department_id = #{user.primaryDepartmentId}, status = #{user.status.name}, must_change_password = #{user.mustChangePassword}, session_version = #{user.sessionVersion}, version = version + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE tenant_id = #{user.tenantId} AND id = #{user.id} AND version = #{user.sessionVersion}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) FROM iam_user u JOIN iam_user_role ur ON ur.tenant_id = u.tenant_id AND ur.user_id = u.id JOIN iam_role r ON r.tenant_id = ur.tenant_id AND r.id = ur.role_id WHERE u.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ACTIVE' AND r.role_code = 'TENANT_ADMIN' AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' AND u.id != #{userId}
SELECT id FROM iam_role WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND role_code = 'TENANT_ADMIN' FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO iam_user_role (tenant_id, user_id, role_id) VALUES
(#{tenantId}, #{userId}, #{roleId})
